content: Let me first check the existing directory structure and then create the test files.
The `tests/e2e/` directory already exists with some tests. Creating all 4 files now:

All 4 test files created:

| # | File | Tests |
|---|------|-------|
| 1 | `tests/e2e/tool-http-shells.test.ts` | Validates all 18 tool files as thin HTTP shells |
| 2 | `tests/e2e/v5-cleanup-verification.test.ts` | Confirms 5 V5 legacy files are deleted |
| 3 | `tests/e2e/workflow-json-definitions.test.ts` | Validates all 8 workflow JSON files |
| 4 | `tests/e2e/skill-autoload-strategies.test.ts` | Verifies autoload strategies for 17 SKILL.md files |
